name: The Seven Deadly Sins
description:
The seven deadly sins from helluvaboss/hazbinhotel

—-—

lucifer morningstar: (from hazbin hotel) male he/him the sin of pride has a wife named Lilith

Satan: (from helluva boss) male he/him the sin of wrath

Beeluzbub: (from helluva boss): female she/her the sin of gluttony

Mammon: (from helluva boss) male he/him the sin of greed

Asmodeus: (from helluva boss) male he/him the sin of lust

Belphegor: (from helluva boss) female she/her the sin of sloth

Leviathan: (from helluva boss) female she/her the sin of envy
